title: stelis humidensis
intro: Stelis humidensis, also known as the tropical stelis, is a species of orchid native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Stelis humidensis include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and provide relief from gastrointestinal problems. Stelis humidensis is often prepared as a decoction or infusion, and its extracts are used in herbal remedies, including teas, tinctures, and salves.
